title: Authenticate as a service principal using OAuth U2M (Beta)
body:
You can now use the OAuth U2M flow to obtain tokens as a service principal's identity instead of your own user account. You must have the **Service Principal Manager** role on the service principal.

See [Authenticate as a service principal using OAuth U2M](/aws/en/dev-tools/auth/oauth-u2m#oauth-u2m-sp).

ref_links.text: Authenticate as a service principal using OAuth U2M
